ssm.association.target.Key.Description: User-defined criteria for sending commands that target managed nodes that meet the criteria.

ssm.association.target.Values.Description: User-defined criteria that maps to `Key`. For example, if you specified `tag:ServerRole`, you could specify `value:WebServer` to run a command on instances that include EC2 tags of `ServerRole,WebServer`.   Depending on the type of target, the maximum number of values for a key might be lower than the global maximum of 50.
